# Annotation

Assign cell / spot labels from expression (and optionally spatial context). Distinct task from spatial-domain recovery.

**4 registered method(s)** in this category.

| Method | Maturity | Implementation | Summary | Guide |
|--------|----------|----------------|---------|-------|
| `celltypist` | `beta` | `external` | Pretrained CellTypist logistic-regression cell annotation. | [celltypist](../generated/celltypist.md) |
| `scanvi` | `beta` | `external` | Semi-supervised cell annotation using scVI-tools scANVI. | [scanvi](../generated/scanvi.md) |
| `marker_score` | `experimental` | `native` | Mean z-scored marker expression -> argmax label. | [marker_score](../generated/marker_score.md) |
| `weave_neighbor_marker_annotate` | `experimental` | `native` | Marker-score annotation with deterministic spatial score smoothing. | [weave_neighbor_marker_annotate](../generated/weave_neighbor_marker_annotate.md) |

## Decision notes

### `celltypist`

- Assign cell / spot labels from expression (and optionally spatial context).
- Pretrained CellTypist logistic-regression cell annotation.
- Requires external backend(s): `celltypist`.
- Full page: [celltypist](../generated/celltypist.md)

### `marker_score`

- Assign cell / spot labels from expression (and optionally spatial context).
- Mean z-scored marker expression -> argmax label.
- Teaching / baseline method — not a field-standard claim.
- Full page: [marker_score](../generated/marker_score.md)

### `scanvi`

- Assign cell / spot labels from expression (and optionally spatial context).
- Semi-supervised cell annotation using scVI-tools scANVI.
- Requires external backend(s): `scvi-tools`.
- Full page: [scanvi](../generated/scanvi.md)

### `weave_neighbor_marker_annotate`

- Assign cell / spot labels from expression (and optionally spatial context).
- Marker-score annotation with deterministic spatial score smoothing.
- Research incubator — do not treat as a production recommendation.
- Full page: [weave_neighbor_marker_annotate](../generated/weave_neighbor_marker_annotate.md)
